planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage as a guest (not logged in)
Verify the 'Features' link is visible in the top navigation
Verify the 'Log in' button is visible in the header
Verify the 'Tournaments' nav link (anchor to #tournaments) is visible for guests
Verify the '⚔️ Tournaments' header button is NOT visible for guests
Verify the 'Home' link is visible in navigation
